author: Tamara G.
pros: ModuleQ is a dynamic partner for enhancing workplace productivity, offering AI-driven insights directly within Microsoft Teams. Its seamless integration with Office 365 and Salesforce ensures that users receive timely and relevant content, tailored to their work patterns. The overall value and convenience provided by ModuleQ's intelligent solutions make it a positive addition to any team's toolkit.
cons: Could benefit from more granular reporting to make connections between what content is being delivered and individual user interests and trends for actionable insights.

description: Excellent and white gloves level over all experience with Francesca.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: very high potential for what ModulQ is trying to get you to accomplish
cons: Some synching issues in terms of ModulQ being able to easily identify certain companies
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great AI assistant, lacking local language support/relevance
author: Roy F.
pros: I love the pre-meeting briefs, integration with Salesforce, email, calendar, etc. Ease of use and almost no setup time is also a big plus, and of course the integration with LSEG's/Refinitiv's news and data!
cons: Coming from Israel and managing Israeli clients only, many times the integration with Salesforce does not pick up the right accounts which results in irrelevant information. Moreover, even when the right accounts are being picked, the information is being searched in English and missing most of the Israeli media / Hebrew news relevant to the companies I'm meeting. If it would've local language support, this would've been a game changer for me.

review_title: Keep up to date with your client's developments, in seconds
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Delivery through Teams is extremely convenient. The merge between internal CRM content and external news sources is great. Your interests are automatically picked up from your Outlook activity. ModuleQ has found some gem news articles that I would have never found myself manually
cons: Better location focus would help. More often than not I want to see news that are happening in my town, not across the ocean.

description: Very good. solid service with lots of good information for the end-user.
author: Peter S.
pros: clean set up with the help of ModuleQ Rep. Nice targeting ability to the customers I support (and anything else I am interested in). This keeps me up to date on company/market news as I don't always have time to keep abreast of up to date news.
cons: There is a wide variety of sources can be overwhelming. I need to tighten that up a bit.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Truly Smart Assistant for Customer-Facing Professionals
description: ModuleQ has literally changed the way I prepare for customer meetings, do my industry and customer research, and share insights with my team. It saves me time, gives me more confidence that I have not missed major external news before a meeting, and gives me interesting talking points in even the most difficult customer conversations. We saw that our sales teams who used ModuleQ regularly were booking more customer meetings and so there is a direct impact to sales effectiveness as well.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Some of the best features of the product are its simplicity, ease of use, ease of integration, flexibility to customize for different roles (eg banker, sales person etc), and it's rapid and unobtrusive learning model. Time to a high level of effectiveness is less than 3 weeks. The insights come to you, rather than you having to search for them, and the helpfulness of this in the workflow of a busy professional cannot be overstated. Using ModuleQ allows me to be better prepared for any customer or prospect conversation!
cons: Some of the nice to haves for this software (I believe some are on the roadmap), would be availability of premium research content, ability to collaborate using the insights, new data sets (eg deals, ESG), and integration into other sales / frontline tools, for an even more seamless user experience.

review_title: Timely half page summary information you want, in 1 place, collated from multiple sources
description: This is a must have tool for anyone who works with customers - Sales, Customer Success, Sales Engineering, Products (who engage with Customers in describing their products' features and functionality), Marketing (distributing product info to customers).
author: Nick S.
pros: Timely information in 1 place, collated from multiple sources, summarized to about half a page - only about what I care to know, and nothing about what I don't care to know! I can train it to improve as well.
cons: Not really a con, as we all know that getting private company information is a big difficult. However, if you contact awesome ModuleQ folks, they even get those "turned on" fairly quickly. So, what may appear as "not working well", turns back into the "pros" section!

description: It's been a very positive experience so far. I've only used it for a short time. However, what I've seen so far has been helpful in my daily workflow.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The application knew when I had a meeting with a client coming up on my calendar. It automatically brought in news and analytics about the said company prior to my call.
cons: I'm waiting for more features with the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Making an impact with Sales teams
description: We are delivering new sales collateral to our sales teams in MS TEAMS based on their preferences. ModuleQ team is great to work with. Regular cadence of meetings to discuss progress and new ideas. Team are very responsive.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Proactively delivering useful information/content to sales managers. Easy to set up. Integrated into MS Teams.
cons: Would like to see more on the AI side around how it learns from responses and what it changes for a user when it comes to content delivery.

description: The ModuleQ team is helpful and responsive.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Delivers a complete, relevant and concise summary of the news related to the topics I am most interested in (my clients).
cons: ModuleQ having data from SalesForce as well would be useful.

review_title: Information people care about, delivered where they work, and easy to action
description: The team at ModuleQ listened and learned what we were trying to solve for, partnered with us on a solution and process that worked for all, and it led to a highly successful deployment. It was the opposite of a transactional experience, and embodied the right approach to long term collaboration.
author: Eric F.
pros: It is up and running instantly and delivering value within hours. It gave us a new way to make sure that our users got critical information delivered to them in Teams, which was where people wanted to get information. The support was tremendous and the potential has endless limits.
cons: Nothing that was a big con that comes to mind.

description: I am Interested in the add-on, yet making the information consumable is the key. Potentially less information but more relevance, based on my job profile.
author: Ulvi U.
pros: Daily rhythm of information distribution is keeping me up to date
cons: Too much info makes it less consumable; relevance is a clear factor
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's fantastic, and the support team couldn't be more helpful
author: Chris H.
pros: Easy to use and configure to individual preferences. The content is great and really detailed.
cons: At times you receive the same content on a number of occasions.

description: Having used ModuleQ for some years now I love how it has integrated into my experience in Teams and with Refinitiv allowing me to get market insight, connect quickly to the relevant market data and find key news pieces that add to the quality of my customer interactions. I couldn't stress enough how easy it has been to set up and how relevant the news and updates I receive are to my day-to-day business conversations.
author: Simone D.
pros: It gives me frequent and customizable updates around what is happening in the market with my customers and keeps me informed on key developments so I always have something to start the conversation with.
cons: I would love to see this be developed to include individuals as well for when I'm speaking to HNWI individuals, for example, but I can imagine that will soon follow suite.

author: meryem M.
pros: Easy integration. Automation pre meeting briefing
cons: There is nothing that i dislike about this product

review_title: Timely and actionable insights for salespeople
description: ModuleQ is used by our highest performing salespeople to consistently beat quota. Armed with the right insights at the right time, our sellers are better equipped to advance the customer conversation in both sales and retention efforts.
author: Chris M.
pros: Super easy to configure and set up. Instantly starts providing insights, which continuously improve through AI. Pre-meeting briefings provide just-in-time insights about clients and prospects.
cons: There was some transitional work to migrate onto our new Office365 tenant.

description: Very positive and it keeps improving.
author: kendall M.
pros: The way it links what I follow and alerts me to what I am interested in
cons: takes daily work to tune is and load all the data I cover

description: Good so far. Support from customer success managers has been great in particular.
author: Francisco S.
pros: Interesting articles sent to me based on my preferences. Quick snapshot of news impacting client ahead of a meeting.
cons: Roadmaps for LSEG/ModuleQ would be nice to see, otherwise, no cons to think of.

review_title: Excellent Source For BI and Prospecting
author: Jay M.
pros: I am a Teams User for ModuleQ - I like the way I receive business critical information on a daily basis
cons: Only thing I would suggest is a more intuitive curated version of certain topics.

description: great so fat, i take a look from time to time to see if i am missing out on news
author: Antonio K.
pros: news integrated to my opportunities in salesforce
cons: limited functionalities and parameters to tweak for the opportunities in salesforce, but i expect this will be improved
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very positive and a no brainer to use for a sales person
author: Peter D.
pros: easy to use and high level headlines are great to read through prior to my day/week of meetings
cons: some non applicable articles and links but not too man

author: Ewa B.
pros: Meeting prep summaries are useful to some extent
cons: Redundant news stories on irrelevant entities
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Allan V.
pros: Excellent assistance and post sale service.
cons: No implementation with Sales Force with all the domains in my company.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Joyce Y.
pros: I like the feature of receiving news in Microsoft Team for the companies that I am interested in.
cons: I have not experienced anything that I don't like yet.

description: Good experience so far, information about companies we are going to meet is provided as soon as the invitation is in outlook.
author: Christiane K.
pros: The software is easy to use and very reactive.
cons: Would like the software to incorporate all companies in advance.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
